name: Broiled Gingered Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken legs with thighs (8 oz each)
4 oz Fresh ginger, cut into 1/4-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a very sharp knife to score the chicken skin diagonally, spacing cuts about 1/4-inch apart.
2. Arrange the chicken in a single layer, skin side up, in a baking dish.
3. With the machine running, drop garlic and ginger through the feed tube of the food processor; mince finely.
4. Mix minced garlic and ginger with lemon peel, salt, and pepper.
5. Add cilantro and mix finely.
6. Blend in lemon juice and vinegar.
7. Add oil in a thin stream through the feed tube with the machine running.
8. Rub the mixture over both sides of the chicken; set aside for 2 to 3 hours.
9. Grease broiler pan and position about 4 inches from the heat source.
10. Preheat the broiler.
11. Transfer the chicken to the heated pan.
12. Broil until just tender, very juicy, and deep golden, or 10 to 15 minutes on each side.
13. Turn the chicken skin side up for the last 2 to 3 minutes and brush with any remaining ginger sauce.
14. Transfer the chicken to a warm platter and let stand for 5 minutes.
15. Garnish with cilantro sprigs and lime wedges.
